source_pr.title: server: schema info api of http status server

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it assumed a deterministic order for schema/database listings returned by the HTTP status server (`/schema`), but the underlying schema list order is not guaranteed (it can vary across runs/implementations). This PR stabilizes the test by sorting the returned schema names before assertions (and by asserting on stable schema metadata), avoiding reliance on incidental iteration/list ordering.
fix_pattern: Sort list results (e.g., schema/db names) before assertions; avoid relying on incidental iteration order of returned collections.
